description: A French monthly payslip (bulletin de paie) showing employee/employer header fields, earnings, social-contribution lines and gross/net totals.

employeeName.description: the employee's name without any honorific or title (exclude Mlle, M., Mme, etc.).

employerName.description: Name of the employer as printed at the top of the payslip header.

payPeriodStart.description: Start of the pay period (Periode du) in YYYY-MM-DD format.

payPeriodEnd.description: End of the pay period (au) in YYYY-MM-DD format.

paymentDate.description: The payment date (Paiement le) in YYYY-MM-DD format.

siret.description: The employer SIRET number as printed, kept exactly including any spaces.

totalBrut.description: The gross pay total (Total Brut) as a number without separators.

totalEmployeeContributions.description: The total employee contributions (Total des Cotisations et Contributions, salarie/Retenue column) as a number.

totalEmployerContributions.description: The total employer contributions (Total des Cotisations et Contributions, Part employeur column) as a number.

netImposable.description: The taxable net amount (Net imposable) for the period as a number.

netAPayer.description: The net pay (NET A PAYER) as a number without separators.

earnings.description: Earnings lines above Total Brut (base salary, bonuses/primes); one object per printed line with a designation label.

designation.description: The earnings line label (Designation) exactly as printed in French.

base.description: The Base column value for this line as a number, or null when blank.

rate.description: The rate column (Taux salarial) for this line as a number, or null when blank.

amount.description: The earned amount (Gain) for this line as a number.

contributions.description: Social-contribution lines; one object per printed line that has a designation label (skip blank-label continuation rows).

designation.description: The contribution line label (Designation) exactly as printed in French; this is the matching key for the row.

base.description: The Base column value for this line as a number, or null when blank.

employeeRate.description: The employee rate (Taux salarial) for this line as a number, or null when blank.

employeeAmount.description: The employee deduction (Part salarie, Retenue column) for this line as a number, or null when blank.

employerRate.description: The employer rate (Taux patronal) for this line as a number, or null when blank.

employerAmount.description: The employer contribution (Part employeur) for this line as a number, or null when blank.
